name: skill-suite-orchestrator
description: Antigravity adapter layer for the unified skill-suite-orchestrator entry. Reuses the existing core orchestration logic, routing policy, and minimal-necessary-set dispatch without modifying the Codex-facing core skill.

single_entry.positioning: Expose one antigravity-facing entry while preserving the shared core logic in skill-suite-orchestrator.

supported_task_scenarios: 文件规划与辅助技能发现

preprocessing_rules: Identify the dominant scenario before selecting any subskill.
Resolve whether one skill is sufficient before adding helpers.
Do not expand into plugin-owned flows unless the user explicitly asks for them.

requirements: List only the selected minimal subskill set and why each one is needed.
Do not skip directly to execution.
Validation must show evidence appropriate to the selected scenario.

minimal_necessary_set_policy.strategy: Start from one primary skill and add only explicitly necessary helpers.
rules: If one skill is sufficient, stop there.
Do not add a helper skill because it might be useful.
Prefer exactly one browser skill at a time.
Prefer exactly one debugging protocol at a time.
Treat using-agent-skills as a meta-skill, not a default routing target.

shared_core_logic.compatibility_goal: Codex and antigravity share the same core orchestration logic and routing outcomes.

integration_constraints: Do not copy child skill bodies into the adapter.
Do not change existing routing policy from the core orchestrator.
Do not rewrite the core SKILL.md from this adapter layer.
